items.title: How is Decisions different from a workflow tool or integration platform?
items.body: Most workflow tools automate isolated tasks, and most integration tools simply connect systems. Decisions orchestrates the work between systems, manages exception-heavy rules and exceptions, and provides a layer to govern both human and AI-driven actions.

items.title: Can Decisions work with our existing systems and legacy technology?
items.body: Yes. Decisions integrates with enterprise systems of record through a library of pre-built connectors and an extensible integration framework.

items.title: Is Decisions only for enterprise organizations?
items.body: No. Decisions scales from mid-market deployments to global enterprise footprints.

items.title: How does Decisions help with AI governance?
items.body: Decisions enforces policy guardrails around agentic AI actions — every agent decision runs through the rules engine and is auditable end-to-end.

items.title: Is Decisions built for complex enterprise use cases?
items.body: Yes. Decisions was purpose-built for exception-heavy, long-running, cross-system workflows that core platforms cannot express cleanly.
